hero.title: A fully autonomous AI agent in 678 KB
hero.sub: One static Zig binary that connects 50+ model providers to 19 messaging channels — with memory, tools, sandboxing, cron and an HTTP gateway built in. Runs in about 1 MB of RAM, measured by the project.

alts.label: Build from source (Zig 0.16.0)
alts.code:
git clone https://github.com/nullclaw/nullclaw.git
cd nullclaw
zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall

quickstart:
Onboard once, then talk to it.

```bash
# quick setup with a provider key
nullclaw onboard --api-key sk-... --provider openrouter

# send a single message
nullclaw agent -m "Hello, nullclaw!"

# start the long-running runtime on 127.0.0.1:3000
nullclaw gateway

# health checks
nullclaw status && nullclaw doctor
```

features.title: 50+ providers, one config
features.body: OpenRouter, Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama, Groq, Bedrock and more — plus any OpenAI-compatible endpoint via a custom base URL.

features.title: 19 messaging channels
features.body: Telegram, Discord, Signal, Slack, WhatsApp, Matrix, IRC, Email, Nostr and others. Each channel sits behind its own allowlist; empty means deny.

features.title: Memory with hybrid search
features.body: SQLite FTS5 keyword search merged with vector cosine similarity by default. Nine other engines, from Markdown files to PostgreSQL, when you need them.

features.title: Sandboxed by default
features.body: Auto-selects Landlock, Firejail, Bubblewrap or Docker. File access is workspace-scoped and secrets are encrypted at rest with ChaCha20-Poly1305.

features.title: Speaks A2A, MCP and ACP
features.body: Implements Google's A2A protocol v0.3.0, connects MCP servers over stdio or HTTP, and ships an ACP stdio adapter for editors.

features.title: OpenClaw-compatible
features.body: Same config structure, snake_case and all. `nullclaw migrate openclaw` imports config and memory in one command.

note: Pre-1.0: config and CLI may change between releases. Size and memory figures are measured by the project.
